title: Krieg Unleashes Poison Gas
scene: On pages 1–4, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. After the fight, the Baratie shifts from survival to Sanji’s unresolved bond with Zeff and the cooks.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Hey! Did you forget you inhaled poison!? Deadly poison!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And what're you planning to do by taking away the very man who tried to kill you!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: SANji...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: When he wakes up, could you pass him this message?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Let's meet again,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: out on the grand line."

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're... Still gonna be a pirate?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: PSH, you never learn, do ya?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: When I think about it,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's nothing else that I want to do.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I guess before I realized it,

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don Krieg's ambition became mine as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gin!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Gin!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I might... only have a few more hours to live...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So it might be a bit cowardly for me to make this decision only at the end of my life, but it's still good for me nonetheless.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I've decided that this time, I'll do things of my own will... in my own way.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If I do that,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I won't have a place to run away to, right?

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: Ha. Loyalty to the Don, my ass!

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: All I've been doing is using the Don's name as a "Shield" to escape and hide behind.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: As long as you're prepared,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: things like being scared of your enemies or getting hurt,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: are nothing but useless worrying. That guy over there taught me it's better not to worry about any of that stuff...!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
